name: trabuco-marketplace
description: The Trabuco plugin: conversational Java/Spring Boot scaffolding and AI-agent-native project extension, driven by the Trabuco CLI. Migration feature is being redesigned for 1.10.0.

plugins.name: trabuco
plugins.description: Exposes Trabuco CLI functionality (architecture advice, module catalog, scaffolding, doctor) as Claude Code skills + subagents, grounded in Trabuco's opinionated Java conventions. Migration feature is being redesigned for 1.10.0.
